description: Verification: all 108 tests pass after adding ProviderHealthCache + isHealthy to solveConstraints. No regression.

asi.hypothesis: Adding health checks to the constraint solver with a new isHealthy callback and deduped docs won't break existing tests

description: Verification: PolicyEngine integration infrastructure — all 166 tests pass (146 existing + 20 new)

asi.hypothesis: Adding PolicyEngine integration infrastructure (RoutingHints, StrategyRules, evaluateStrategy, buildStrategyRules, pipeline wiring, /auto-router rules command) won't break existing tests

description: PolicyEngine integration: example config updated with policyRules documentation

asi.hypothesis: Adding policyRules documentation to example config won't affect tests

description: PolicyEngine integration: README updated with /auto-router rules command

asi.hypothesis: Documentation updates in README don't affect tests

description: Route-scoped policy rules: StrategyRule.routeId scopes rules to their parent route, preventing cross-route interference

asi.hypothesis: Rules must be scoped per route to prevent route A's rules from affecting route B
asi.fix: evaluateStrategy() now skips rules with non-matching routeId; buildStrategyRules accepts optional routeId; rebuildPolicyEngine passes per-route IDs

description: Time-of-day conditions for PolicyRuleConfig: afterTime/beforeTime/daysOfWeek with overnight range support

asi.hypothesis: Adding time-of-day conditions to PolicyRuleConfig enables time-based routing strategies
asi.features: afterTime, beforeTime (HH:MM), daysOfWeek (0-6), overnight range support (22:00-06:00), isTimeInRange() exported

description: Circuit breaker: tracks per-provider failures, opens circuit at threshold, transitions to half-open on cooldown, wired into constraint solver and tryTarget loop

asi.hypothesis: A circuit breaker prevents repeated attempts to failing providers
asi.features: CircuitBreaker with closed/open/half-open states, configurable threshold/window/cooldown, wired into isOnCooldown and tryTarget, reset on /auto-router reset

description: Cost-aware ranking: estimated model cost used as secondary sort key within UVI buckets, surfaced in reasoning output

asi.hypothesis: Sorting candidates by latency+estimated cost saves money without sacrificing speed
asi.features: lookupModelCost, estimateModelCost (4x output multiplier), cost tiebreaker in rankedSort and preferSort, est cost in reasoning output

description: Balance fetcher retry: exponential backoff (500ms base, 2 retries) on HTTP failures + dedicated tests for retryWithBackoff and buildMonthlyQuotaWindow

asi.hypothesis: Adding retry with exponential backoff to balance fetcher improves resilience against transient network errors
asi.features: retryWithBackoff with configurable maxRetries/baseDelayMs/maxDelayMs, applied to DeepSeek balance fetch, 5 retry tests + 4 buildMonthlyQuotaWindow tests

description: Dry-run evaluation: /auto-router explain now shows per-rule match/fail trace and applied hints

asi.hypothesis: Showing strategy rule evaluation trace in /auto-router explain improves routing transparency
asi.features: PolicyEngine.getLastTrace() returns per-rule match/fail with reason; lastStrategyTraceByRoute stores trace for /auto-router explain; formatHintsHuman() for display

description: Circuit breaker visibility: /auto-router circuit command + status line 🔌 circuit segment

asi.hypothesis: Adding circuit breaker visibility helps users understand why providers are being skipped
asi.features: formatCircuitStatusSegment in status line, /auto-router circuit shows per-provider state with icons

description: Pipeline integration tests: 9 tests covering constraint-solver→budget-auditor→partitioner chain end-to-end

asi.hypothesis: Integration tests for the core pipeline chain catch regressions that unit tests miss
asi.features: 9 test scenarios: empty pipeline, vision filter, budget audit, UVI promotion/demotion, hard mode, cooldown, critical UVI, full end-to-end chain

description: Quota cache tests: 6 tests for mapRouteProviderToOAuth covering all provider mappings and edge cases

asi.hypothesis: Testing the provider-to-OAuth mapping function prevents routing bugs from misconfigured auth

description: Enhanced intent classifier: more file extensions (.java/.c/.cpp/.h, .md/.rst/adoc), doc patterns, conversation depth boost

asi.hypothesis: Better file extension and conversation depth awareness improves intent classification accuracy
asi.features: New code extensions (java/c/cpp/h), doc file patterns (md/rst/adoc), README/CHANGELOG patterns, conversation depth boost (+2 for 5+ msgs, +1 for 3+)

description: Extracted pure display utilities into src/display.ts + 20 tests (parseModelSpec, describeTarget, formatHintsHuman, formatRemainingMs)

asi.hypothesis: Extracting pure utility functions from index.ts into a testable display module reduces index.ts size and enables unit testing
asi.features: parseModelSpec (7 tests), describeTarget (4 tests), formatHintsHuman (5 tests), formatRemainingMs (4 tests)

description: Extracted cooldown helpers (parseResetAfterMs, getCooldownMs) to src/display.ts + 12 tests

asi.hypothesis: Extracting cooldown logic enables testing of error-to-cooldown mapping
asi.features: parseResetAfterMs (6 tests: seconds/minutes/hours/abbreviated/edge cases), getCooldownMs (6 tests: rate limit/quota/not found/bad request/reset-after/default)

asi.hypothesis: Extracting normalizeModelToken enables testing the fuzzy model token matching logic
